体験・サービス満足度の理由(やんばるエリア): Excellent food and service at Onna Eki. I got great souvenirs here, had great meals and snacks, and I enjoy living here as a new resident.
推奨項目(やんばるエリア): At the Onna no Eki farmers’ market, I found delicious local mangoes, bitter melon, and a great selection of fresh, high-quality vegetables. Their taco rice was absolutely delicious—I ended up eating it four times during my seven-day stay! Unfortunately, it’s only available for dinner, but it’s definitely worth coming back for.

I came back three times during my seven-day stay because I loved this place so much.
